name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
A president is sitting in the Oval Office, right now, who continues to commit crimes. He continues because he knows his Department of Justice will not act -- and he believes Congress won't either. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285298b2/45c30650/1375e29b8/668a0fac/1688826027/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today's news about Trump's latest attempt to solicit foreign interference to aid him in U.S. elections confirmed yet again he thinks he's above the law.

And if we do nothing, he'll be right.

A president is sitting in the Oval Office, right now, who continues to commit crimes. He continues because he knows his Department of Justice will not act -- and he believes Congress won't either.

After the Mueller report, Congress had a duty to begin impeachment. By failing to act, Congress is complicit in Trump's latest actions. **It 's time for Congress to do their constitutional duty and impeach the president.**

Mitch McConnell is also complicit. The Senate must vote on the bill, already passed by the House, to help states and localities protect themselves from the foreign attacks on our elections that the president has previously welcomed.

In 1974, Democrats and Republicans united in support of impeachment not out of mutual contempt for Nixon but mutual respect for the rule of law. Congress refused to be complicit in future law-breaking by Nixon or other presidents.

**I said it before, and I 'll say it again: It's time for this Congress to start impeachment proceedings.**

\- Elizabeth

## **I need your votes to win the Mirror Ball trophy! **
---
| | If the first show was any indicator, my dancing may not get the highest scores from the judges each week, so we will be relying on YOUR votes to help us stay in the competition and bring home the Mirror Ball trophy.
---
| |
#### How to vote:

Only votes cast between 8-10p ET on Monday, September 23 count. (If you live another time zone you have to vote during that time, e.g. during 5-7p PT)

You can submit 20 votes total for Sean and Lindsay.

You can submit 10 votes by texting SEAN to 21523. Each text is one vote, you have to send SEAN 10 times to submit all 10 votes.

You can submit 10 additional votes online at [ABC.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2f52e0973c&e=f6564bbe3b). You need to start by making an account [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=27431b4dc8&e=f6564bbe3b) (which you can do now before voting opens). When voting begins you login and can add 10 votes for Sean and Lindsay, #TeamSweetandSpicey.

All the information on making an ABC account and other FAQs are [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b8793527aa&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
|
---
| | Dancing is new to me, but I've done a lot of campaigning so we decided to take our case to the voters and launch a "campaign", [Spicer Arnold 2019](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=36e8c97ff5&e=f6564bbe3b). Check out the first "campaign" ad [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6feacda87c&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7af469458b&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Click here to watch the first ad for the Spicer Arnold campaign.
| |
#### For all our supporters in the DC area:

Unfortunately Dancing with the Stars will not be airing live in the DC area due to the Redskin's Monday Night Football game.

If you have a cable account you can login in online on [ABC](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6d4b5809fc&e=f6564bbe3b) and stream it live [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3f79d211e2&e=f6564bbe3b).

You can watch the show after Monday night football, **but you have to submit your votes DURING the live show, from 8-10pm EST. **
---
|

Thanks so much for all your support,

_Sean_
---

Trump's plan to stem border crossings gets results
Border arrests are plummeting after Trump crackdown
_" The decline in border traffic -- if sustained -- could amount to a major victory for Trump as he heads into the 2020 election. Perhaps more important, the experimental measures taken by his administration could reshape immigration enforcement for years to come." \- POLITICO_

Friend,

Did you see the news? FINALLY, the media is telling the truth!

We are BUILDING THE WALL - just like President Trump promised - and it is WORKING.

Just last month, illegal crossings plummeted to 51,000. This is just more proof that a wall at the dangerous southern border actually does keep America safe, so why are Democrats _still_ fighting it?

They block additional funding to finish the wall every chance they get. It's obvious now that they will always choose illegal aliens over American Citizens.

**This must end, Friend.** Before the President takes his next action on immigration, he needs your input on some critical immigration issues.

**[Please take our Official Border Security Survey TODAY to let President Trump know your input on critical immigration issues.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=237ceecc1980d88382ae653e0f0f2316063ceb37ec1792335ea62275d59a788151a01afa1aba5045be98ba27fc2813cceed084eeb23e1e86)**

The truth is, this Administration has achieved more in the first 2.5 years than any other administration in the history of the nation and it's scaring the Democrats.

President Trump gets ZERO credit from the Fake News media, but the American People, like YOU, know the truth, and that's all that matters.

As a true-blooded Patriot, the President is asking for YOUR input, Friend. We're sending him the first round of responses TONIGHT, and we want him to see your answers at the very top.

**[Take our Official Border Security Survey before 9:00 PM TONIGHT to make sure President Trump sees YOUR response.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=237ceecc1980d8832035cdb2a8f77c09b9eba0f19c5acb7e10fb0fac685475f8c3db74795f28724a2167bcc7059e9dc27cccff841e428d3b)**

Peter - I'm excited to share with you that I have a new book coming out on October 15th that is a sort of guidebook of lessons learned in my life about how each of us has the power to make a big difference.

**This isn't a book about politics, but rather a remedy for the division and anxiety we see in our lives these days**.

For a limited time, we will be [sending copies of this book as a thank you for a generous donation](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=750e9355f0414d89b67e00a2f16acb78&_e=4WEBRnmL8tjAijpWbe_HCmOEyY2csOQyuv9rfKkDb0ylXHg_CzHErAYvrdZJv7vwhxBZxdB36vnipTRI8pncjxyGOICOVIIJfUCtuCrKNJADwopKid9MbF2vkPgxBc6ndt5h13XS2vk3C1H5NvgEvt6p0un5pzB1RsL7lN-gTSRleUPX2MrXVNC8fWpo1LugwWW8rvPinpxGjS5bEusasROpf9sRaxvXVQnxIyBHOyLwSi8X9e1Tl8gkbS6eJ-JqUmVKCkw_G7GCCrzyTtxVYA%3D%3D) to support our ongoing efforts to fight for a return to civility and compassion in America.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump wants to pollute our waterways
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The Trump administration announced last week that they will roll back Obama-era regulations designed to protect the nation's waterways from conversion into farm fields \-- in effect giving companies more leeway to destroy our wetlands and rivers. This decision will have disastrous consequences on our environment \-- we've already seen what happens when there are no regulations. Between the 1780s and 1980s, half of our wetlands and waterways were drained and destroyed, endangering critical animal habitats and clean drinking water. This is just the most recent in a slew of environmental protection rollbacks undertaken by the U.S. government \-- they've weakened the Endangered Species Act, allowed for greater methane pollution, and tried to prevent government officials from discussing climate change. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 129 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Should the government protect our waterways from pollution and destruction?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0a/6e9863e8/14fafa2e/1db0dbed/3130210784/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/jErp9PcU") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0a/6e9863e8/14fafa2e/1db0dbed/3130210784/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/jErp9PcU") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0a/6e9863e8/14fafa2e/1db0dbf3/3130210784/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190921a.ND-b&refcode2=FTYyvggwvzGaGOyLfj84")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I want to be radically transparent because I believe we can do this together if everyone understands where we are: We need to raise $1.7 million by September 30th to be able to grow a campaign that can win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
We need to raise $1.7 million
| | |
---
| Team, [**In a moment, I 'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_CB_20190921-fr-CB-radicaltransparency-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I know you get emails like this from us and others all the time. This one is different. I'd like to explain why. We need to raise $1.7 million by September 30th to make the immediate investments necessary to continue building a campaign that can really win. The next ten days will determine whether I have a path in this race. To be completely transparent with you, team, I'm only going to continue running if I see a clear path to victory. This isn't an end-of-quarter stunt or an attempt to spin the press. When we realized we were going to come up short of the resources necessary to grow, I knew we had a choice. So here's what's going on -- no BS: [**It 's now or never to continue building a campaign that can win -- can you chip in $5 to help our campaign reach the $1.7 million we need by the end of the month? Here's a link to donate:**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_CB_20190921-fr-CB-radicaltransparency-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_CB_20190921-fr-CB-radicaltransparency-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Voting won't begin until February, but the choices we'll have then are being determined right now. If you're all in for me (thank you!) -- if you haven't settled on a candidate but you think I bring an important perspective to this campaign, if you believe the Democratic field should include someone like me who represents a low-income, majority-minority community, or if you want to have a choice in this primary beyond the current top four most-resourced candidates -- [**then, please, consider making a donation toward our $1.7 million end-of-quarter goal.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_CB_20190921-fr-CB-radicaltransparency-actives_actives_l4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") A few moments ago, my campaign manager sent a memo about the state of our campaign and our decision to be radically transparent about our next steps to our staff, endorsers, and friends. I want you to hear what it says, too, so it's copied at the bottom of this email. Please read on to hear more from Addisu -- and know how grateful I am for your support today and every day. Together,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_CB_20190921-fr-CB-radicaltransparency-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **Now or Never: Radical Transparency about the Next 10 Days of This Race** **To:** Cory 2020 Supporters, Friends, and Staff
**From:** Addisu Demissie, Campaign Manager, Cory 2020
**Date:** Saturday, September 21, 2019 Cory Booker decided to run for president because he believes that the only way to beat Donald Trump and heal our country is to bring people together -- and he's the best person to do that. He's never been in this to raise his profile or to sell books. He is in it to win it. The next ten days will decide whether or not he can. We've known since the very beginning that he entered this race with some challenges -- he didn't have the near-100% name recognition of some candidates who've been on the national stage before, nor did he enter the race with tens of millions he could transfer from other campaign accounts. What Cory has _always_ had is the ability to inspire Americans to work towards a better, more united America -- and to make us believe that our country can tackle its biggest challenges if we come together. As the only candidate in the Democratic field who goes home to a low-income, majority-minority community, Cory is able to speak with uncommon moral clarity about the pain of Americans who feel left out and left behind, while reminding all Americans that our common pain can only be addressed by reigniting our sense of common purpose. That has been at the core of who Cory Booker is since he entered public life over two decades ago and has been the driving force behind this campaign since Day One. We know that when people hear Cory's hopeful message and vision for a post-Trump world, he wins them over. We've seen it consistently throughout this campaign, and we'll see it again later today during his speech at the Polk County Democrats' annual Steak Fry in Iowa. Here's the real talk: We have reached a critical moment, and time is running out. It's now or never: The next 10 days will determine whether Cory Booker can stay in this race and compete to win the nomination. **How We See the Race -- No BS** Democrats' historically strong, diverse field is about to narrow dramatically, and despite his unique message, political skills, and growing popularity nationwide and in the early states, Cory Booker might not be in this race for much longer -- the same is true for other important voices in the field. While we invested early in building an outstanding organization in our Newark headquarters and the February early states, other campaigns have, in recent weeks, surpassed us in scale and begun spending on paid persuasion efforts online and on television. Between that and the likely increase in the DNC's debate-qualifying thresholds, which would require significant funds to meet, it is probable there are only four campaigns in this race with the money necessary to build and sustain the national organization needed to win the nomination. I'll be blunt: We aren't among them today, but with your help, we can be. **Our Opportunity: Now or Never, Together** Cory 2020 has the resources necessary to continue on as we are now for quite some time, but that is not enough. Cory is one of only 11 candidates who have qualified for the DNC debate in October, but that is not enough, either. We have to change our fundraising trajectory right now -- before September 30 -- or we will not be able to grow our operation fast enough to win. Rather than posture or pretend, we want to give our amazing supporters -- and everyone who thinks Cory is a unique, important voice in this race, whether or not he's their final choice yet -- the chance to step up in this moment when they still have a chance to determine what the final field of candidates will look like. Here's the bottom line: _Cory 2020 needs to raise an additional $1.7 million by September 30 to be in a position to build the organization necessary to continue competing for the nomination. Without a fundraising surge to close out this quarter, we do not see a legitimate long-term path forward._ September is traditionally one of the strongest fundraising months for presidential campaigns. But after a surprisingly positive August, we simply have not witnessed the expected uptick in fundraising over the last three weeks. To put it bluntly, we need to scale our operation up in October and November to remain competitive and need a strong September to make that happen. We need to maximize support from our current donor base, and we need to seal the deal with supporters who like Cory but have been waiting to contribute because of an assumption that they can wait until later. Well, "later" is now. If we do hit our goal, we believe we will ultimately win the nomination because of the early investments we made in talent and infrastructure -- investments that have put us in the game to date and already paid off with Cory earning significant endorsements and support from elected officials and key activists in early states and beyond. We know this will further bear fruit when the majority of voters tune in and make up their minds later in this race; according to an NBC/Wall Street Journal national poll this week, 91% of Democratic primary voters have not made up their minds about which candidate they are supporting. But now is the time to build upon what we've done, not to sit back and be complacent. I want to be clear: This isn't an end-of-quarter stunt or another one of those memos from a campaign trying to spin the press. This is a real, unvarnished look under the hood of our operation at a level of transparency unprecedented in modern presidential campaigns. Raising $1.7 million in just ten days is a herculean challenge, but it can be done. After entering the race on February 1, Cory 2020 raised $1.4 million in the final ten days of March to close out the first quarter of this campaign. We need to do it again (and more!), and we need you to step up to the challenge. It can be done -- but only if we do it together. Cory got in this race to win it and to beat Donald Trump. With four and a half months until voting begins, he is well-positioned to do just that -- if he has the resources to support and grow our team. But if our campaign is not in a financial position to grow, he's not going to continue to consume resources and attention that can be used to focus on beating Donald Trump, which needs to be everyone's first priority in this election. **What We Need To Stay In This -- and Win** If you're all in for Cory Booker -- If you haven't settled on a candidate, but Cory's on your list -- If you think we need a choice in this primary beyond the current top four most-resourced candidates -- If you believe that the race for the Democratic nomination needs the perspective of someone who actually lives in a low-income, majority-minority community -- If you simply think Cory has an important voice and message that more voters should hear -- here's what this means for you: **Help raise the $1.7 million needed before 11:59 pm on September 30.** This is the moment to act. If you wait, it will be too late. Voting might not begin until February, but the choices that Democrats will have then are being determined right now, and Cory needs your help today. Here's what you can do:
* **Donate.** We literally cannot wait for support to come later. Go to **[corybooker.com/together](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_CB_20190921-fr-CB-radicaltransparency-actives_actives_l5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** to donate today. * **Join the fight.** Text TOGETHER to 40203 to get daily updates between now and Sept. 30th about our progress to goal and how you can help.

name: Zach Graumann
subject: Can you let me explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I know we’ve been sending you a lot of fundraising emails lately. It’s the reality of a presidential campaign, but I wanted to take some time to talk about being on the road with Andrew.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=621%2E377263%2EMniIU7) Friend,

I know we’ve been sending you a lot of fundraising emails lately. It’s the reality of a presidential campaign, but I wanted to take some time to talk about being on the road with Andrew.

Something amazing has been happening recently. Some candidates have to beg to get noticed by the public. Not Andrew. These days, people line up for hours to take selfies with him. If you don’t believe me, just look at what happened when he was trying to get some hoops in at Georgetown! It was truly amazing to witness. The most common thing I hear from folks who are waiting in line to meet him or hear him speak is that they love how Andrew approaches the problems our country is facing. It’s a lens formed from his own experiences living in cities across the U.S. -- not from polling results or talking points provided by expensive consultants. Simply put, he sees our problems and their solutions differently than politicians. And voters are responding to it.

But, friend, if vision was all that was required to win, Andrew would already be the Democratic nominee. Instead, we are confined by the realities of electoral politics -- the realities of running for the highest office in the land.

The worst part? Needing to raise money to prove Andrew is viable and investing in the resources we need to amplify Andrew’s vision. After all, he doesn’t have a robust donor network or an email list he’s built over the last 10 or 20 years.

**He’s got an honest perspective. He’s got unique solutions. He’s got the internet. And he’s got you.**

Which is why you’ve been receiving so many emails lately. Andrew isn’t raising money from high-dollar fundraisers with mega-donors. He’s raising money from his grassroots supporters like you, and these emails are the best way for us to do that.

**So I’m reaching out today because we’re now just 8 days away from the third-quarter FEC filing deadline. We have to turn over a report of what we’ve raised in the last three months and it’s critical that we show Andrew’s strength and depth of support.

[ Can you help us kick off our end-of-quarter fundraising push by making a contribution right now? We’ve set an aggressive goal before midnight on September 30th and I know we can hit it if everyone reading this pitches in. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10756?t=5&akid=621%2E377263%2EMniIU7) **
| [make a Contribution ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10756?t=7&akid=621%2E377263%2EMniIU7)
---

Thank you for believing in Andrew. We’re fighting every day to make you proud.

\-- Zach **Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10756?t=6&akid=621%2E377263%2EMniIU7)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=621%2E377263%2EMniIU7) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=621%2E377263%2EMniIU7) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"U.S. President Donald Trump welcomed Australia’s prime minister on Friday for only the second state visit of his administration." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f98b2c8ac&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Welcomes Australia's PM, Cementing Strong Trade, Security Ties**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f38162129&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Reuters_
“U.S. President Donald Trump welcomed Australia’s prime minister on Friday for only the second state visit of his administration, [signaling] the close bond between the two allies,” Alexandra Alper and Steve Holland report. “Days before the visit, a sign draped across the Australian Embassy in Washington proclaimed ‘100 years of mateship’ between the two countries. On Friday, Trump feted Morrison’s arrival at the White House’s South Lawn with a 19-gun salute and U.S. Marine Band performances of each nation’s national anthems.”

🎬**President Trump:** [America and Australia share an “unbreakable bond”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=488b8c8d7d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Touts Newly Constructed Border Wall Sections**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba4c715efb&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“In an exclusive interview on ‘Fox & Friends’ Thursday, President Trump told Fox News' Ed Henry that ‘brand-new’ wall sections have been built along the U.S.-Mexico border, contrary to claims by some Democrats,” Edmund DeMarche writes. “Trump said the new wall sections include 14 miles at the site in California, where the interview was held. ‘This was not here two weeks ago. This is all brand-new wall. ... We're building on many different sites all up and down along the border,’ he said, adding that the new 30-foot barrier was impenetrable even by ‘championship mountain climbers.’”

** Something to share:** [Great progress being made on the wall!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23c5a037d7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Melania Trump Participates in Reopening of Washington Monument**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e4d21cfd6&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“First lady Melania Trump, alongside a group of local fourth graders, helped cut the ribbon to re-open the Washington Monument, which had been under construction in the wake of a 2011 earthquake,” Kate Bennet reports. “When it first opened to the public in 1888, it used to take more than 10 minutes to reach the top of the 500-foot Washington Monument, by steam-propelled elevator. Today, it's automated, and the ride in a posh new lift with video screens is just 70 seconds. That's just one of the upgrades Trump helped celebrate Thursday morning as she served as special guest to officially reopen the iconic structure after more than two years of closure for much-needed renovations.”

** **[After three years of renovations, the Washington Monument is open!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=824a6df80e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**California Can’t Go Its Own Way**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=727a542297&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“If you haven’t heard, President Trump has declared war on California, the auto industry and the world’s climate. Or that’s what liberals are saying about his Administration’s plans to revoke California’s waiver that lets it set national fuel economy rules that raise costs for consumers across the country,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. “The Trump Administration isn’t prohibiting [automakers] from manufacturing more fuel-efficient and electric cars. Liberals call the President a totalitarian, but he’s the one giving consumers and businesses a choice.”
---
|
---
| [**The NYT Kavanaugh Smear Shows Why the Press is the Least-Trusted Institution in America**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0209bc59d6&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“A Columbia Journalism Review poll released this year found that half of all Americans have ‘hardly any confidence at all’ in the media, which beat out even Congress as the institution for which the public has the lowest confidence,” Marc Thiessen writes. “It’s not hard to see why.” Last weekend, _The New York Times_ published a story claiming a “previously unreported” sexual assault allegation against Justice Brett Kavanaugh. “One small problem ... the female student in question ‘refused to discuss the incident’ and that ‘several of her friends said she does not recall it.’” The _Times_ conveniently left that part out of its initial story, later adding a “clarification.”
---
|
---
| [**This Constitution Week, America Welcomes 34,000 New Legal Citizens**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e9da878af&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
For Constitution Week, “we recognize the signing of the U.S. Constitution and reflect upon the meaning and importance of citizenship and what it means to be an American, whether native or foreign-born,” writes Ken Cuccinelli, Acting Director of U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS). Across the country this week, USCIS welcomed over 34,000 new citizens at more than 300 special naturalization ceremonies in celebration of Constitution Week. “We believe that U.S. citizenship is the greatest honor and privilege in the world,” he said.
---
|

| Patriot,
When the Democrats called on Al Sharpton to testify before the House Judiciary Committee they were in for a rude awakening. There was no chance that I would stand by and let this racist and anti-Semitic 'leader' off the hook. The fact that he even appeared before our committee is a mockery of our political system. Shame on Jerry Nadler and the House Democrats for allowing this to happen.
Have you seen this?

| Team: We're thrilled with the strong show of support from friends like you, and we wanted to make sure you had a chance to pitch in to help keep Ed fighting for our progressive values in the Senate.

_**[Rep. Joe Kennedy III kicked off his primary challenge against Ed today, and we need all hands on deck. Will you pitch in $27 or more now and stand with Ed before the FEC deadline?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
Team,

I'm overwhelmed by the strong show of support we've had this week. Since Joe Kennedy III announced his primary challenge, supporters have shown that our people-powered movement to fight for our progressive values is stronger than ever.

**And because the response from supporters like you has been so big, and with nine days to go until the FEC deadline, we 're _increasing_ our goal from $50,000 to $75,000.**

We're on the front lines of the fights that define our times, and with your help, we'll win in Massachusetts, take back the White House and the Senate, and put our country back on the right track.

_**[Will you help us reach our new FEC deadline goal by pitching in $27 or more?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

I'm proud of the broad, diverse, and growing endorsements we've received.

> ➜ Elizabeth Warren
> ➜ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
> ➜ AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees
> ➜ Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, Coalition for Social Justice, the Sierra Club, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Massachusetts, and more
> ➜ And 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature
Every day, I'm taking on Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell to defend our progressive values.

But I can't do that without your help. And reaching our FEC goal will show everyone that our movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality is unstoppable.

_**[That's why we must reach our $75,000 FEC deadline goal. Will you pitch in $27 or more to help?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump still has done nothing on gun legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, It has been over a month and a half since Trump discussed passing gun control legislation in the wake of a series of mass shootings in August \-- but now, the president is saying he's no longer pursuing background checks as part of the solution to the gun violence epidemic. He blames Beto O'Rourke's impassioned and forceful defense of gun control legislation at the September Democratic debate as the reason that these reforms won't pass, but we know there's another reason. Trump had a 45-minute phone call with NRA chief executive Wayne LaPierre, who has repeatedly stood in the way of common-sense gun control and pushes for responses that actually increase gun sales. He "warned" (read: threatened) Trump that his base would not look favorably upon any move to restrict gun purchases. It's time to get the NRA out of our policy decisions. They have held this country hostage on gun control for too long, enticing lawmakers into ignoring constituents with large checks and an extremely powerful lobbying machine. [**At When Democrats Turn Out, we 're providing early support to candidates who are willing to stand up to the NRA -- but we need your help. The NRA and GOP are going to throw millions of dollars in dark money into every election they can. Please, every donation made, no matter how small, will go toward making true, lasting change in our country. Could you support us with a donation of $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0d/6e9863e8/14f1b0f6/1db0dbfa/1472128085/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190921c.ND&refcode2=JXw9eLZa4CVtQ3pCkalm") Thank you for standing with us! -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0d/6e9863e8/14f1b0f6/1db0dbf8/1472128085/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190921c.ND&refcode2=JXw9eLZa4CVtQ3pCkalm")

subject: Nancy Pelosi is helping solve our climate crisis [stand with her!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
---
| | Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats are doing everything to help solve our climate crisis:- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats are doing everything to help solve our climate crisis:** [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47ba/4bd7760e/42a97f8b/77e0ee97/1709598826/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190922_PelosiClimate_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190922_PelosiClimate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190922_PelosiClimate_U1_X1") House Democrats are doing everything they can to hold Donald Trump and his administration accountable for slashing environmental regulations and DESTROYING our environment. Speaker Pelosi knows that climate activists around the world just participated in a Climate Strike this week because **the issue of climate change is too important to stay on the sidelines.** That's why we're sending Nancy Pelosi a thank you card for her hard work getting the House to focus on the climate crisis. subject: $1.7 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, **We 've raised over $193,366.97 (so close to $200K!!) in only nine hours. Not to mention the fact that we've received donations from every state, D.C., and Puerto Rico. This is a huge deal, team -- this means we're well on pace for hitting our critical goal of $1.7 million by September 30th. We need to keep up the momentum.** [**$1.7 million. Ten days. Now 's the time to give, team. If you want to continue hearing Cory's voice in this race, chip in $5 right now to help us hit this goal.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_l1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") This is a real, unvarnished look under the hood of our campaign. **_We must raise_ $1.7 million** before September 30th to be in a position to build the organization we need to compete for the nomination. We've built one of the strongest organizations out there -- from Iowa to South Carolina, New Hampshire to Nevada, and of course, in Newark, where it all began -- but I want to level with you: We have to change our fundraising trajectory right now -- before September 30th -- or we will not be able to grow our operation fast enough to win. Rather than posture or pretend, we want to give our amazing supporters -- and everyone who thinks Cory is a unique, important voice in this race, whether or not he's their final choice yet -- the chance to step up at this moment when they still have a chance to determine what the final field of candidates will look like when voting begins. **Now is the time to give before it 's too late. Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford right now to help us sprint to the finish line.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_express5_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_express10_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_express20_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_express50_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_express100_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_expressother_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")_ If our campaign is not in a financial position to grow, Cory is not going to continue to consume resources and attention that should be used to focus on defeating Donald Trump. That needs to be everyone's first priority in this election. But, when we hit this goal of $1.7 million, we are still in a strong position to win, thanks to early investments we made in talent and infrastructure. **If you 've been sitting on the sidelines, this is the moment, team. Help us raise the $1.7 million we need before 11:59 p.m. on September 30th.** This campaign has already overcome so many obstacles -- and this will be our biggest one yet. I have all the faith in the world that this team will smash through our goal. One day, we'll look back on this as a make-or-break moment on our successful mission to send Cory to the White House. **But we can only make that a reality with your help.[You know what to do.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_l2_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's go,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_contribbutton_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=%") _P.S.**[After you donate, share the link with a few friends and ask them to chip in too.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190921_AD_20190921-fr-AD-EOQupdate-actives_actives_l3_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **This is a team effort -- and it's going to take all of us._

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: Official Beto Survey
subject: Important survey on our gun policies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Beto’s been in the news a lot lately talking about guns. We’ve attracted a
lot of predictable attacks from the NRA and Donald Trump. Now some
Democrats in Congress, and one of our opponents, are saying Beto has gone
too far.

They’re worried about the politics of a mandatory buyback program. But
we’re not concerned about the politics. We want to do what’s right for the
American people. Everywhere Beto goes, he’s listening to gun owners and
non-gun owners alike on this issue. We really want to hear from you -- the
people who have supported this campaign from the beginning -- on where you
stand.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190921/?source=ema20190921-56613&t=1001&akid=56613%2E444211%2Em45w6V ]Can you take a short survey on guns? Here’s the first question:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34713?source=ema20190921-56613&t=1002&akid=56613%2E444211%2Em45w6V ]Some Democrats in Congress, and some of our opponents, have said that
Beto is hurting our chance to pass gun reforms by advocating for a
mandatory assault weapons buyback program. What do you think?

[3]( ) I agree. Beto’s call for buying back assault weapons is hurting
our chances to pass other reforms.
[4]( ) I disagree. Beto should keep calling for a mandatory buyback
program.
[5]( ) I’m not sure.
